Validate input data for inversion

Source: R/api_functions.R
validate_inputs.Rd

Checks that input data meets requirements for the specified model and returns cleaned, validated data.

Usage

validate_inputs(
  d2h_wax,
  longitude,
  latitude,
  d2h_wax_err = NULL,
  elevation = NULL,
  c4_fraction = NULL,
  pft_tree = NULL,
  pft_shrub = NULL,
  pft_grass = NULL,
  model_name = "b0b1"
)

Arguments

d2h_wax

Leaf wax d2H values

longitude

Longitude values

latitude

Latitude values

d2h_wax_err

Measurement uncertainties

elevation

Elevation values

c4_fraction

C4 vegetation fraction

pft_tree

Tree PFT fraction

pft_shrub

Shrub PFT fraction

pft_grass

Grass PFT fraction

model_name

Name of model to use

Value

List of validated inputs
